We are down to two! I say again, we are down

Well, we could tell ya, but, you know?

I need three guards to cover that jeep right now, let's go.
You two. I want you both up on that ridge ASAP.
We're looking for a Major Wallace.
That'd be me. Listen, you fuckers!
You gonna tell me where the rest of your stash is.
Bill Wallace. S-2, First Field Force.
You guys must be the field reps
-I was told to expect. -So, where is it, Major Wallace?
Just when I thought I'd seen it all.
Right. And I clearly don't need to know.
If you told me, you'd have to...
-Let's go to the... -Would you please get
For Christ's sake, mama's son, what is your problem?
I told you, I don't understand a fucking word you say!
-Okay, come with me. -She said a demon took her husband.
-You speak gook? -A little. Comes with the territory.
Yeah. We can have that territory.
Knew it. What are they for?
-I need to know about that. My men are out... -We're done here,
Sir, Six-Alpha is on the phone.
I need to talk to the Six.
Rampage, Charlie Oscar Six. What do you got?
One truck, ten barrels, all with standard markings.
Hot as hell. Over. The NBA driver
is showing early symptoms of radiation poisoning.
This is number five since we've started the track.
Yeah, a... any further word on Snakebite?
Negative. We overflew both last knowns.
Nothing but bush and more bush.
All right, big army is gonna come in
You just stay tight. Lock it down and stand by.
-we can pick up Snakebite's track... -No, no, no,
That is, uh, too much of a risk out there.
We are ass-deep in alligator right now, okay?
We're just gonna mark our time and... until I figure this thing out, all right?
Make sure Bravo gets out of the perimeter.
All right, let's rock and roll.
All right. Here we go, Logan.
Vulture overwatch, you got eyes on this circus.
Roger that. Got a visual. Clear to engage. Over.
Vulture Six, clean house here, man.
We're good to go. All right.
-All right. -Just give me a second, okay?
Hang in there. We got you, we got you.
two friendlies on the north side perimeter.
Call the birds and then join us.
We checked all the other huts.
-No joy. Looks like these two are all we gonna get. -We'll take it.
We'll get you outta here, fellas.
Get you back to your families.
-Oh, yeah! -And the rocks pretty crew from Vulture Squad.
Supposed to get you and your guys loaded into the Huey
-and out to the sea... -Wait, wait, wait. Who the fuck ordered this?
Some colonel named Jericho. All I know, Sarge.
Well... we're not getting any beer.
You gotta be fucking kidding me.

You recons look like a sack of hampered assholes.
More importantly, what are we doin' here?
Because we all made some poor life choices, Baker.
The old man would love to discuss
-I ain't asking! -♪ Time has come today ♪
It is not bad for a sorry ass LURP team.
Yeah, yeah. Well, you gotta remember,
I let you choose that team
of degenerates and fuck ups, so, you know,
maybe you were right after all.
Yeah, you gotta be a lunatic if you're gonna be a Vulture.
Well, maybe so, but I'm gonna tell you something.
Let's see what you guys think of this next mission.
Have a seat, everybody. Smoke 'em if you got 'em.
There we go! You hungry there, Razor?
Oh, man, I bet you are! You deserve it.
I got so much respect for this guy. You know why?
Because he doesn't beg like a little fucking dog.
He's an apex predator, top of the food chain.
Took on a whole platoon of my men and it wasn't even scared.
Now it's sitting in there, he's all chained up,
and he's waiting for an alpha male to feed him.
Yeah, you did one shit hot job on that POW snatch.
We ain't seen that yet this side of the Z.
By the way, you managed to do it without even pissing me off.
Y'all ready for your next kick-ass mission?
Bring it on, Colonel. All RT Vulture needs
and half a shoulder to carry it on.
Yeah, maybe bring it on after a night's sleep, Colonel.
we're gonna drop you in right here.
Three days ago, we sent a MIC team in here,
They were sent over here to investigate
some heavy lift transports, new, uh, construction bunkers
-and that sort of shit. -Green beanies get lost in all that bush, huh?
and we could see nothing from the air.
There is something going on out there
Assuming we find 'em, do we round 'em up,
-call for extraction? -That is negative. I need you to find 'em,
And what's so special about this valley, sir?
Seems kinda Major League for trolleys, sir.
We can theorize about that shit forever.
Y'all stay in your fucking lane.
Keep your head on a fucking swivel...
the Green Berets were looking for, sir?
I got moisturizer that's older than you, you little fucking bitch.
Here's what the fuck I want.
I lost my fucking Green Berets
and I need y'all to find 'em for me.
-Vultures will find 'em, sir. -All right, we're gonna come back here
Y'all check all your gear, and you come back here
rested and ready to go. That's it. Get the fuck out.
I'm gonna need you to stick around
What's the rest of the story, Colonel?
Are you... thinking we might find a bunch of SF corpses out there?
You go out there and you find me something, all right?
And you let me worry about the rest of it.
I'll come up with it, don't you worry.
you go out there and you get me a detailed report.
That's all I ask. And you make sure that none of these fuck ups,
all right, these loose cannons of yours,
they don't try to play hero.
Now, are we tracking on that?
Can you at least tell me what they were looking for?
and I'll take a big eraser to that 201 file.
All those allegations that you had with McNeil...
...I believed in you during that investigation. I was in your corner.
That's why I had you transferred over to LURPs.
Just keep these fuck ups in line, that's all I ask.
You don't need a poncho. Makes too much noise.
And break down the C-ration boxes.
If it's bulk or excess weight, shit can happen.
LURPs write the wrong rules, I guess.
There it is, com padre. Carry only what you need.
If you can't carry it in a pocket or a liner,
Got some loco dudes on this team.
I knew what I sign up for when I volunteered comin' over here.
Listen, man. Baker picked you for a reason.
It's his reason and he knows what he needs in the Vulture.
Must figure you have what it takes.
Best thing you can do is prove him right.
Oh, it's fine. What you got there, bro?
-I found this hooch. -Oh, damn. Where'd you get it?
Them two spooks, they had it in their tent.
Figured they went out there blowing bush
and trading rounds with the gooks, so,
I rate good stateside hooch more than they do.
This shit any better than what they cook up at home?
No, it doesn't even compare to Smoky Mountain bust head,
-but it'll do in a pinch. Hmm? -Ah.
You remember you dragging your drunken ass out of that mess?
But I owe you, if that helps.
Oh, what helps is you not getting so shitfaced at camp
you can't see straight on the next mission.
I'd seen what was waiting for us on the other side.
Hence why I don't feel bad taking this here hooch as an advance payment.
Quid pro quo. Jesus Christ, Eli!
Don't try to sound intelligent or you're gonna lose that charm
-we all love. -Why don't you shut that mouth of yours for once, Keyes?
Or you're gonna miss out on all these presents I got here.
-Since Miller here has found the Good Book... -Mm. Mm-hmm.
...I'm gonna excuse him from the, uh,
You wanna work on your charm? Follow Keyes, man.
This man can sell ice to Eskimos.
Must've buttered up some assistant to the colonel to find these out here.
-Buttered it up and slipped it in. -Mm-hmm!
Oh, man, I learned from the best.
This better have tits in it.
You got the most important choice you're ever gonna make.
You ever seen a naked woman, man?
-New guy's got some balls. -Oh. Come on, man.
Cut the shit, all right? New guy just made an honest
and... truthful answer, and we should respect that.
That means... this is for you.
Oh. What would happen to this club without you?
You gotta... you gotta talk to somebody about this shit.
there's no range coaches out there, man.
You can shoot without chanting all that...
-...fucking brass bullshit. -I can't help it, Keyes.
The voices are in my head all the time.
But if I say 'em out loud, it helps me stay on target.
But it's gonna get your dumb ass killed.
Look... I don't wanna see that happen.
So you promise me, when we get back to the rear, you talk to somebody about this.
Assuming we even make it back to the rear.
I see the boys are corrupting you.
Team brief in ten mikes. All hands in the briefing tent.
Gonna be some embarrassed Green Berets
when we pull their asses out of there.
We're coming up on datum point zero.
What was that cutting a path through the trees back over there?
but bigger than I've ever seen.
-The enemy still uses them. -Fuck, I can't understand Jericho.
Would've something about that instead of talking about
a stupid goddamn tiger the whole time.
Ah, Jericho's shit is fucked up, man.
-You cannot trust that motherfucker. -Cut the shit.
Whatever dinky-di Phoenix number he's running, don't mean nothin'.
We got our job, find those Green Berets.
They're weird enough, I could absolutely see
Just these big ass Liberace feathers.
Leon, you ever see something like this?
-What do you got? -Yeah, I got a backpack.
-Don't look at me. -No. Like guano, but,
There's a mark here that says "Research Station Four."
Was there anything else around the pack?
Yeah, uh, two different kinds of tracks.
US Army issue size tens and some other shit.
Oh, and it look like struggle.
We follow those tracks for a klick or two.
Fucking things are all over these hills.
That ain't no fucking rock apes, man.
Whatever that is, it's moving in this direction.
I found him, he's down here!
-Could be anywhere now. -Don't let the shadows play tricks on you.
Whatever it was, let's get some distance between us.
-It might not be that simple, Sarge. -Why not?
It wasn't scared of us. And if it's hungry,
it wouldn't be scared to come back either.
We gotta get out of its territory.
How much territory are we talking?
If it's a tiger, 60 square miles.
That's this whole fucking valley, man.
Yeah! So quit your bitching and get a hump at it.
-You heard what the colonel said about tigers. -Yeah.
Great length. But that ain't no tiger.
-Yeah, no shit. -It's nothing we can't handle. Let's move.
I wanna get to that research station before dawn.
Borodin's orders are to track the Americans.
We engage only if they approach one of our facilities.
Only been here a week, and I wish I could stay forever.
Con Nhen, you need to relax.
How do you know if Russian was telling you a joke?
Can you pick up the trail?
Still may be close. Spread out. Do not engage.
Be lower than the grass. Be quieter than water.
-We should just... -Be quiet. Spread out and keep moving.
Tolstoy! Aleksandr's gone. His riffle's filled with blood.
Are any of your people out here?
What is Tolstoy looking at? I need to see him.
We need to find all the Americans and kill them all.
Clear that hole, Keyes. See what you can find in there.
What the hell do we think that was back there?
Heard some Aussies in Phuoc Tuy talking about gook spooks
Yeah. It was a couple gooks in a turkey suit
We could call it in right now.
Tunnel goes on forever. Probably to the other side.
For what it's worth, I think we're going the right way.
Go! Come on! Move, move, move!
Leon! Leon, we gotta go this way!
We lost the other guys, Sarge! What do we do?
Now, let's kill these fuckers first!
We walked into a fucking nightmare!
I see an exit, now, let's go!
-Come on, let's go! -Logan, come on, man!
-I think we're clear. -We ain't gonna post up here.
Suppose those things got the other guys?
Looks like the same one we saw coming in earlier.
Yeah, it does. We should see where it leads.
This is really fucked up, man.
Did the colonel tell you these fucking things were out here?
When we link up with the other guys, we jump on the radio
I tell you one thing, this ain't no fucking recon
looking for a bunch of lost SF dudes.
Leon, if we want answers, we're gonna have
I can't believe I fucking volunteer for this shit.
Remember I told you about the voices?
These voices, they're real, they're real, man.
I'm telling you they're fucking real.
Baker and Leon could still be out there.
I'm telling you, something's not right.
This is what we do, Leon.
I picked you for a reason, man.
This is, this is fucking bullshit.
I didn't sign on to kill fucking dinosaurs.
We gotta just keep our shit together.
Best thing is to find Baker and Leon
and get the fuck out of Dodge ASAP.
Find Baker and Leon? That's fucking bullshit, man.
I ain't going back into that fucking cave of horrors
We gotta call for emergency extraction
Except Leon was humping the radio.
There's a river around here somewhere.
I saw it on the map. If we keep heading down,
Get it out. Get it all out.
the woman who just saved your lives, thank you very much.
I have a place over that way, my lab.
We'll be safe there from the rex and the flock of deinonychus.
How are you even here if you don't know what that was?
That's the mother tyrannosaur across the river.
They mate for life, with the mother raising the chicks
and the father hunting. Without the father,
the mother will be forced to take chicks on the hunt with her.
The father will do whatever it takes
to get back to his territory and family.
We should be safe for now.
Listen, lady. We're a recon team, seven men.
Got separated when we ran into those fucking things.
We're not going anywhere else until I find my team.
If your men are on the other side of the river,
You can take it from me, and I'm never wrong. This way.
Or you can stay and die, your choice.

We go northeast until we hit the blue line.
Looks like a klick or less.
Them notes we found had it marked as Research Station Four.
And what about, uh, Sergeant Baker and Leon?
they'll head in the same direction.
He had to know something like this was out here, right?
I doubt it, man. Uh, you know,
if they knew there were dinosaurs out here, he'd send an Arc Light strike
and turn this whole thing into a goddamn parking lot.
I mean, he's a... he's an evil prick, but he's not stupid.
Except we're north of the Z.
You think Washington would strike up here on some intel of dinosaurs?
Think he'd think that's as crazy as me.
Yeah, too much goin' on to hear anything else.
Fuckin' doubt that, man. There were gooks out here.
It is fuckin' conch snacks now.
Goddammit, look at all this dino shit.
My home away from home for one year, seven months, 11 days.
There were more like us. American soldiers.
-It's the best men we have. -Then they're probably dead.
It's all that happens in this valley, death.
Don't worry, this is the safest place to be in the valley.
four stories high on one side.
So now, you explain to me why you are here.
I think you're the one with some explaining to do.
What the fuck is she putting in her arm?
What the fuck is going on?
What is the purpose of this facility,
and why the fuck are there dinosaurs outside?
It is so great to hear voices again.
I've been alone for so long.
General Borodin happened. He killed everyone who knew about this place.
Painted the walls with their brains.
If everyone else is dead, then what are you still doing here?
surviving with nothing else to do but medicate.
Leon, go see if you can get a radio signal.
Now, I wouldn't have needed saving if it wasn't
Charlie Oscar Six, this is Vulture Bravo Two. Over.
And I'm gonna bet my old friend Viktor Charlie
-had nothing to do with that. -Charlie Oscar Six,
-this is Vulture Bravo Two. Over. -But you,
you seem pretty good for it.
Oh, I am very good for it.
Charlie Oscar Six, this is Vulture Bravo Two. Over.
Borodin, what's his deal? Why kill everyone?
It is the Russian way to protect what he is doing here.
Oh, I don't think I want to play this game, Sergeant.
Information is the greatest commodity in war,
-and I can see you've been deprived of it. -Mm.
Why don't I ask you 20 questions
and see if you know what the fuck you are even doing here?
Requesting immediate Dust Off. We've come under heavy fire and mission is compromised.
I say again, immediate Dust Off. Over.
Is the mission complete, Sergeant Baker?
Six... I'm gonna get this out in plain language.
I don't know what you really sent us out here to find,
but we found a fuck load more than just some missing Green Berets.
There's some kind of crazy Russian experiment that's been going on out here.
Why don't you ask higher about a general named Borodin?
Somehow, his team have brought dinosaurs back to life,
and it was dinosaurs that ate your Snakebite team.
Now, since we inserted, we've been attacked
by all kinds of prehistoric beasts,
all of them hungry, pissed off,
and chomping at the bit for their little piece of the American pie.
We need an emergency extract from this fucking zoo,
Hey, I... li... listen to me, Sergeant Baker.
Take a fucking breath, all right?
And give me your position. That's all I'm asking.
Fucking listen to me. Five of my men are missing.
I'm gonna go find them, dead or alive.
When I do, I'll send a POS REP...
...and we'll be bringing with us one female Russian survivor.
If you want her to spell it out for you,
You think you can blackmail me, you little son of a bitch?
You don't know, all right? You've got one piece in the puzzle, that's all.
If you want that puzzle piece, Colonel,
I think they're fucking delirious, you hear... did you hear that?
Goddamn dinosaurs, losing their fucking minds,
-eating the fucking mushrooms. -Yeah, sounds just about right, Colonel.
I'll fucking rip his skin off and make ponchos out of him.
You are all just pawns like I was.
That's my men you're talking about,
Yeah, I know where I would rather be.
You know all about these things.
How they operate and where they're likely to be.
See, you're on point, lady. Get your ass up.
Any reason to believe what he said?
I don't think so, Colonel. I mean, we're out here
looking for some kinda nuclear reactor or collider
that might be capable of producing weapons-grade nuke materials,
Yeah, but hold on, but he... Baker's not crazy, all right?
So, w... why would he lie to us?
Anything's possible when you start fucking around with nuclear materials.
Yeah. Well, we damn well better find out.
about this Borodin character, all right?
-I'll get right on it, sir. -Let's go. Come on. Fuck off.
Little boys will play as soldiers.
I ain't playing. I'm asking your professional opinion.
Then, as professional courtesy, I will answer.
It was fast and it was strong. And it ambushed me clean.
It was covered in feathers, I think.
It was at least eight to ten feet tall.
A lot bigger than specimens I've seen
I've counted six big ones in the valley.
The most intelligent of these monsters.
It's what she's not telling us, that I don't trust.
So far, I've saved your skins and given you shelter.
Site Three is about a klick up ahead.
Then we go west to Site Four.
Figure if Baker and Leon are still alive, they'll head there.
Yeah, the heat, that's the problem here.
Baking me a cake in the middle of a...
Sounds like our guys in a firefight.
-Need to know how many and where! -Just came out
Get to work, man. You good?
-Motherfucker, are you good? -Almost blew my cock off.
Ah, yeah. It's just circumcised, bro.
I gotta put an... no, it's not bad.
Oh, they've got air support now. That's, that's good.
Grab Keyes. Stay low and head for the trees.
-Oh, fuck. Fuck that, man. -Keep moving! Don't look back.
Don't look back, man. Keep moving.
No, no, no. No, no, no. Keep moving.
Only two of you now, huh?
What in hell are those things?
My job is to find GI, not babysit you.
About 12,000 miles and a million fucking years from being okay.
Oh, you're gonna be okay, man.
Logan, when you're done patching him up,
-take point and keep us in the trees. -Yeah.
-Fucking... take it easy. -Can these things smell blood?
I'm coming through with Leon and a hitchhiker.
-Glad to see you alive and kicking, man! -Who's the chick?
SITREP, who's shooting at you? What the fuck happened to Keyes?
I don't know and I have no idea.
Goddamn flappy fucking big bird dinosaurs cleaned 'em up.
Took a round in Keyes' thigh. He won't be easy to move now.
Listen, evac is inbound and Sofia here
has a safe place to wait it out.
Let's get him patched up and move.
She knows more than we do. She's our ticket outta here.
I prefer to think of you as my ride.
Russians? Our ticket home is a fucking Russian?
I'm born in East Berlin, if that makes you feel any better.
not after what we've been through.
So those guys out there are fucking Russians
Yeah, and there's likely more of them out here.
Whatever these things are, they were stalking us last night.
Pack hunters. They like to... half the pack on the ground
and the other half in the treetops.
Watch for their sickle claws on each toe.
What is she, like a dinosaur freak?
A dinosaur super freak, you stupid redneck
I was just asking, is all.
Fuck you! Fuck you! Fuck you!
How many of these things are there?
-Wait! -You have to run fast to catch him!
-They will drag him until they feel it's safe! -Fuck.
-Let's get after him. Go! -Go, go, go.
Fuck... get the fuck off me, you little shit!
Get the fuck off me. Logan!
Where the fuck are you, guys? Fuck!
You're gonna need fries and fucking gravy.
-Give me, give me... -Miller, get in here!
-Eli, stand watch. Keep it on. -Put pressure bandage...
Keep pressure on that. Eli, stand watch.
-They tore his fucking guts out, Sarge. -Oh, Jesus! Oh, fuck in...
Looks like he's been... he's been run through a fucking meat grinder.
Miller, Miller. Get that stretcher out.
Grab a couple of poles to carry him back
to the research station for evac.
Leave him. Those big raptors will come back
with their full pack of six, and when that happens, we'll all die.
-If we leave him, we might have chance of survival... -I don't give two fucks
how bad he's cut up. He goes with us.
Vultures, sun sets in half hour.
I do not wanna be stumbling around in the dark
with Marlboro Man passed out on the stretcher.
Rig him in there and let's roll.
-...God! Oh, my God! -More bandages, more bandages.
-You're in the best of hands, Keyes. -Fuckin' hurts...
-What you doing this twice for in one day, man? -Oh, my God.
Best of hands, brother. Best of hands.
-Hurry up! -Move, move, move, move, move, Logan!
-Get the door! Come on! -...at the door!
On the table! On the table!
Lay him down, lay him down!
Hey, Keyes, Keyes, look at me. Look at me.
-Fuck. Fuck, fuck, fuck, fuck, fuck. -Keep the pressure
Take perimeter. Do an ammo count, premise review.
anything else we can do for him?
He ain't gonna make it much longer, Sarge.
Maybe change the dressings, but I... I... I don't know...
Get some morphine into him and see what we can do to stop the bleeding.
You gotta get that morphine in right now.
Keep your eyes on me. Eyes on me.
Come on... I'm coming, Keyes, I'm coming in.
-I need you to calm down... -Okay, ready?
-Where's the other one? -Get the morphine into him!
Where the fuck is the other one?
-Son of a bitch. -...feel that? You feel that, man?
-Keyes. Hey, listen to me. Take a deep breath. -There you go...
Can you breathe? Can you breathe?
That's good, that's better. That's good, man.
I need you to stay with me, man.
Just couldn't help yourself, could you?
I did nothing to stop this.
We could've stopped it. It was just accident.
An accident? Why didn't you say this before?
I wanted to, but you are...
Lady, I'm not the one trying to shoot you or eat you.
I know, I know. I see that now. You are good men.
...but I needed more than good men.
I needed someone who could stop
what is happening in this valley.
Baker, we need more eyes on the perimeter.
Listen. My mission is to get my men home, not fight dinosaurs.
There won't be a home if Borodin isn't stopped.
Sofia, what exactly was going on here?
It's all right. We got you.
My husband was nuclear research scientist.
We were sent here by Soviet madman Borodin
to do what was strictly research.
in the middle of a jungle in the middle of a war.
Even Russia didn't want his research on home ground.
When you are ordered to do something
by a man like Borodin, you do it or you die!
When we arrived, this collider had already been tested.
We were told that he was working on wormholes
so that Soviet Union could crush America,
send tanks onto White House lawn.
But my husband said that Borodin...
Particles did not collide and some elements slingshot beyond speed of light.
Wormhole... opened in the past and dinosaurs walked through.
I came with my husband because of my knowledge.
I was out studying the herbivores that came through.
if he could make use of the dinosaurs.
I heard cracking of machine guns and came home... to find whole team dead.
Darling husband included. And so I've sat here,
doing the only thing I can to ease the pain.
We should have stopped him. He just left his mess of lizards
and moved on to rebuild another collider.
Look at where playing God got us.
You know where this rebuilt collider is?
They entered a river in the mountains.
He thinks I'm dead, but I know about it.
You have to help me make this right
or more people will suffer the consequence.
It's okay. It's okay, man. It's okay.
We're gonna get you back home, man.
What you gonna tell your mama about this?
Yeah, these things just freak me out, man.
I'd handle it better if I had me a drink.
Should've brought along that lucky flask.
Baker catches you with that flask in the field,
he's gonna jam it up your ass.
That little flask saved my ass one time.
When you and I were running for CAV, before we went to the LURPs...
...Charlie jumped out from behind a pile of bamboo
